questionText: Does your organization choose to account for and report technological CO2 removals or captured CO2 with geologic storage, or have you done so in previous years?
questionKo: 귀사 및 보고 아니요 CO2 제거 또는 CO2 저장, 또는 귀사 그렇게 이전 연도s?
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp:
The global scientific consensus makes it clear that the world needs to reduce greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions and remove carbon dioxide (CO2) from the atmosphere to avoid a 1.5°C (or even 2°C) rise in global average temperature compared to pre-industrial levels. Both land sector mitigation approaches along with new CO2 removal technologies will play an important role in reducing, halting, and ultimately reversing, the accumulation of greenhouse gases in the atmosphere.
The Greenhouse Gas Protocol Land Sector and Removals Standard (LSRS) establishes requirements and recommendations to account for, report and track GHG emissions, CO2 removals and other relevant metrics that reflect anthropogenic activities in the land sector, as well as other CO2 removals technologies. The Land Sector and Removals Guidance complements the Standard by providing comprehensive guidance on implementing the requirements and recommendations in the Standard , examples, case studies and calculation guidance.

columns.text: Technological CO2 removals or captured CO2 with geologic storage in the reporting year
options: Yes, in our upstream/downstream value chain
Yes, in both our direct operations and our upstream/downstream value chain
columns.textKo: CO2 제거 또는 CO2 와/과 저장 보고연도
optionsKo: 예, 모두 당사의 직접 운영사업장 및 당사의 업스트림/다운스트림 가치사슬

columns.text: Specify the reason for no technological CO2 removals or captured CO2 with geological storage in the reporting year
options: Relevant activities identified but chosen not to account for/report
columns.textKo: 에 대한 CO2 제거 또는 CO2 와/과 저장 보고연도
optionsKo: 활동 식별된 그러나 아님 에 대한/보고

columns.text: Technological CO2 removals or captured CO2 with geologic storage were accounted for and reported in previous years
columns.textKo: CO2 제거 또는 CO2 와/과 저장 에 대한 및 보고된 연도

guidance.text:
General 
This question allows you to indicate the relevance of technological CO2 removals or captured CO2 with geologic storage for your organization in line with the GHG Protocol Land Sector and Removals Standard (LSRS) and Guidance .
Based on selections in this question, you may be presented with 7.13.1 which allows you to report which LSRS technological removals accounting subcategories are relevant, and which you calculate. However, complete reporting of emissions and removals in these categories is not yet enabled in CDP's 2026 corporate questionnaire.
Technological CO2 removals or captured CO2 with geologic storage in the reporting year (column 1) 
Under the LSRS, technological CO2 removals and captured CO2 with geologic storage are optional to account for and report. Select "Yes, in our direct operations", "Yes, in our upstream/downstream value chain", or "Yes, in both our direct operations and our upstream/downstream value chain" if you choose to account for and report CO2 removals or captured CO2 with geologic storage in the reporting year.
These activities may be relevant to your organization if:
you own or control technological CO2 removal operations in the reporting year;
you purchase, consume, process, or sell products that store CO2 that was technologically removed in the reporting year; or
you store (in the reporting year) captured fossil CO2, captured biogenic CO2, or CO2 that was technologically removed in geologic reservoirs.
Technological CO2 removals or captured CO2 with geologic storage were accounted for and reported in previous years (column 3) 
Select "Yes" if your organization has reported technological CO2 removals or captured CO2 with geologic storage in the past. If these activities were relevant to your organization in the past but you have never reported them, select "No".
Note that in 2026, organizations are not expected to have accounted for/reported technological CO2 removals or captured CO2 with geologic storage in previous years, since 2026 is the first year they are able to report in line with the LSRS.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text:
Captured biogenic CO2 with geologic storage: net CO2 removals resulting from annual net increases to carbon stored in geologic carbon pools from carbon derived from biological sinks ( GHG Protocol ).
Technological CO2 removals with geologic storage: net CO2 removals resulting from annual net increases to carbon stored in geologic carbon pools from carbon derived from technological sinks ( GHG Protocol ).
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항에서 사용하는 주요 용어의 의미를 설명합니다. 용어 해석은 CDP 2026 원문과 국문 양식의 용어 사용을 우선 적용하십시오.

change.question_ko: 귀사는 기술 기반 CO2 제거 또는 포집 CO2의 지질 저장을 산정 및 보고하기로 선택했습니까? 또는 이전 연도에 그렇게 한 적이 있습니까?

sectorTagsKo: 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트,, &, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '귀사 및 보고 아니요 CO2 제거 또는 CO2 저장, 또는 귀사 그렇게 이전 연도s?'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
translationSourceKo: CDP 국문 양식 기반 국문 보정
